metadata.title: EditTextAI - Edit Text in Image Online with AI
metadata.description: Edit, replace, add, or remove text in images online using AI. Free tool for product photos, social media posts, and more.

hero.title: Edit Text in Image Online
hero.subtitle: Replace, add, or remove text in your images in seconds with AI. No design skills needed.

replacePanel.placeholder: Enter the text to replace with

deletePanel.hint: Click on the text area you want to remove

replace.title: Replace Text
replace.desc: Select any text in your image and replace it with new content. AI preserves the original style and texture.

add.title: Add Text
add.desc: Add custom text to your images. Perfect for promotions, captions, and branding.

delete.title: Delete Text & Logo
delete.desc: Remove unwanted text, watermarks, or logos seamlessly. AI fills the gap naturally.

recolor.title: Change Color
recolor.desc: Change the color of any text in your image. AI adapts lighting and texture automatically.

step1.title: Upload Image
step1.desc: Drag & drop your image or click to browse

step2.title: Describe Changes
step2.desc: Tell AI what text to replace, add, or remove

step3.title: Download Result
step3.desc: Get your edited image in seconds

aiPowered.title: AI-Powered
aiPowered.desc: Advanced AI models handle complex text editing with precision

easyToUse.title: Easy to Use
easyToUse.desc: No design skills needed. Just upload and describe your changes

fastEfficient.title: Fast & Efficient
fastEfficient.desc: Get results in seconds, not hours. Streamlined workflow

freeOnline.title: Free Online
freeOnline.desc: No downloads or installations. Use it directly in your browser

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How does the AI edit text in images?
faq.a1: Our AI automatically detects text regions in your image, understands the layout and style, then applies your requested changes while preserving the original look and feel.
faq.a2: We support JPG, PNG, and WebP formats with a maximum file size of 4MB.
faq.q3: Is this tool free to use?
faq.a3: Yes, our basic text editing features are completely free. Advanced features may require a subscription in the future.
faq.q4: Can I remove watermarks from images?
faq.a4: Yes, you can remove watermarks, logos, and other unwanted text. Our AI will intelligently fill the removed area.
faq.q5: How accurate is the text replacement?
faq.a5: Our AI attempts to match the original font style, size, color, and texture as closely as possible. Results may vary depending on image complexity.
faq.a6: Yes, all uploaded images are processed securely and automatically deleted after processing.
